description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for QLCplus that builds and tests on Linux and Windows. Trigger on push and pull request events. For Linux, use an ubuntu-20.04 environment with a matrix of tasks including compile-qt5, compile-qt5qml, and coverage-qt5. Install dependencies, set up Qt, and run make and test commands. For Windows, use a windows-latest environment with a single task compile-qt5.
